block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Elon Musk offered to buy 100% of Twitter for $54 per share on Thursday, he also proved this with a tweet. Remember that the CEO of Tesla had already acquired a 9.2% stake in the social network. In his letter to Twitter Chairman Bret Taylor, Musk wrote: “Twitter has extraordinary potential. I will unlock it."
block_07: The company is part of a group to build a hydrogen hub - after the meeting of the H2 summit on April 13, the shares rose slightly. In total, shares of EQT rose by 18% in one week.
block_10: The share price has fallen by 9% this week. Analysts are convinced that this is a correction and soon the stock price will set a new record, though the current cost is below $300.
